steps.label: Intake
steps.description: Capture the reported issue, requested outcome, environment, and constraints.
steps.instructions: Normalize the request into a clear problem statement and list missing information without starting implementation.

steps.label: Context Load
steps.description: Load repository context, previous decisions, relevant docs, and current workspace state.
steps.instructions: Read the smallest useful set of files and summarize repository conventions before choosing an approach.

steps.label: Classification
steps.description: Classify the request so the workflow can dispatch the right agent, command, or runtime path.
steps.instructions: Identify the primary work category, risk level, affected runtime/provider, and whether human approval is needed.

steps.label: Evidence Collection
steps.description: Gather concrete evidence before proposing root cause or changes.
steps.instructions: Use local validation, logs, generated artifacts, and source references to support the diagnosis.

steps.label: Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Explain the root cause and produce a focused implementation plan.
steps.instructions: Tie each proposed change to evidence and state what will not be changed.

steps.label: Gate 1: RCA and Fix Plan Approval
steps.description: Human review checkpoint before implementation changes begin.
steps.instructions: Pause the runtime and wait for an explicit approve or reject decision.

approval.question: Approve the root cause analysis and fix plan before implementation?

steps.label: Test-First Fix
steps.description: Create or update focused validation before applying the implementation change.
steps.instructions: Add the smallest meaningful test or check, then make the implementation pass it.

steps.label: Validation
steps.description: Run the required checks and summarize remaining risk.
steps.instructions: Execute repository validation commands and explain any skipped checks with reasons.

steps.label: Gate 2: Summary and Release Impact
steps.description: Human review checkpoint before release-impact actions.
steps.instructions: Pause the runtime before commit, push, pull request, tagging, or publish actions.

approval.question: Approve the validation summary and release-impact actions?
